nasb.text: ‘Now these were the visions in my mind as I lay on my bed: I was looking, and behold, there was a tree in the midst of the earth and its height was great.

esv.text: The visions of my head as I lay in bed were these: I saw, and behold, a tree in the midst of the earth, and its height was great.

cnv.text: 我躺在床上時腦海中所見的異象是這樣： 我看見大地中間， 有一棵樹，十分高大。

ccb.text: “‘以下是我躺在床上时脑中出现的异象：我看见大地中央有棵非常高大的树。
